# Pull Request

## Linked Issue

Paste the related issue link or number.

Example:
Closes #12

---

## What Changed

Describe what you built, fixed, or updated in Free Sewaa.

Example:
- Added Post Item form UI
- Improved homepage layout and navigation
- Fixed Browse Items display issue
- Updated README and project docs

---

## Why This Change Was Needed

Explain why this change was important.

Example:
This update supports the Free Sewaa MVP by improving the donation posting flow and making the platform easier to use during the team demo.

---

## How Tested

Explain how you tested this work.

Examples:
- ran locally
- tested feature manually
- checked UI in browser
- verified form submission
- confirmed page navigation works

Write your testing notes here:
- 

---

## Evidence

Add links or screenshots if useful.

- Screenshot:
- Demo video:
- Logs / console output:
- Related commit:
- Related PR:
- Related issue:

---

## Docs Updated

Mark any documentation updates.

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] PROJECT.md updated
- [ ] TEAM_AGREEMENT.md updated
- [ ] Sprint packet updated
- [ ] Other docs updated

If yes, explain:
- 

---

## Demo Impact

What does this change affect in the demo?

Example:
This improves the donation posting and browsing flow that will be shown in the weekly sprint demo.

Write here:
- 

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an Issue
- [ ] Tested before submitting
- [ ] Small and focused change
- [ ] No unnecessary files added
- [ ] Ready for review
